entries.author: Dr. Aurora Vale
entries.description: A living archive that rewrites memory when contained.
entries.containmentProcedures: Store inside a hermetically sealed, Class-3 archive chamber. Only CL4+ personnel may access.
entries.recontainmentProcedures: If the archive breaches, isolate the wing, deploy MTF Rho-7, and restore memory nodes using Procedure 7-A.

testLogs.procedure: Subject was presented with recovered entries for verification.
testLogs.result: Object recorded a 30% anomaly increase, but containment remained stable.

incidentReports.resolution: Access revoked and door lock firmware replaced.
incidentReports.preventionNotes: Enforce CL4+ biometric verification and audit all entry logs.
